title: Node Event Schema
description: Schema for node creation events in the Code Property Graph.

event_time.description: Timestamp of when the event occurred, in ISO 8601 format

node_id.description: Stable identifier for the node (to ensure idempotent ingestion)

node_label.description: Type/Label of the node (e.g., FUNCTION, CLASS, VARIABLE)

properties.description: Additional attributes of the node (name, line_number, file_path, etc.)
